name: clauck
description: clauck — local agent runtime for macOS. Ships the clauck MCP server, the skill reference, and a SessionStart notice that surfaces installed jobs and their semantic hooks to every Claude Code session. Requires the clauck runtime to be installed (~/.local/bin/clauck, LaunchAgent, scheduler). The SessionStart hook self-heals: if the runtime is missing or version-drifted from the plugin, it backgrounds the install.sh bootstrap and informs the agent.
